sizing_rule.note: Optimal f derived from standard deviation analysis. Range: 0.043989 (2 SD) to 0.0806 (5, 8, 10 SD). Select optimal f corresponding to chosen SD cutoff level (2, 3, 5, 8, or 10 standard deviations) based on AHPR/GHPR calculations.

source_rule_text: Position sizing is determined by optimal f values derived from standard deviation analysis, with f values ranging from 0.043989 to 0.0806 depending on the number of standard deviations used in the cutoff calculation.
